name: edit-file-size-outcome
doc: Edit-outcome file-size gate (policy/evaluate.ts + policy/edit-outcome.ts). Before this fix, evaluate() judged an Edit by Math.max(incoming new_string lines, on-disk lines) — so ANY Edit on a file already over FUSE_SOLID_MAX_LINES (default 100) was denied, even one that would shrink it. The fix computes the post-edit outcome (existingLines - countLines(old_string) + countLines(new_string)) and allows when the result is itself compliant OR strictly smaller than the current on-disk count. Setup materializes a 120-line file (over the 100-line default ceiling) at $TMP/big.ts.

steps.doc: big.ts is 120 lines (> 100 default). Edit replaces the 40-line prefix (l1..l40, old_string) with a single line (new_string) → resultLines = 120 - 40 + 1 = 81 <= 100 → allow (empty stdout), NOT denied on the stale 120-line on-disk count.

Same big.ts (still 120 lines on disk — the sim never applies the real edit). This Edit replaces just line 41 (1-line old_string) with a 200-line new_string → resultLines = 120 - 1 + 200 = 319 > 100 and NOT smaller than 120 → deny, SOLID file-size block.
